content: The performance gap between intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM), random network distillation (RND) and specialized curious agents can be explained by a missing 2025 SOTA active memory gating mechanism that prioritizes storing unexpected, curiosity-triggering observations over uninformative ones, rather than treating all novel experiences as equally valuable for intrinsic reward calculation. This hybrid framework would redefine intrinsic reward as a function of both prediction error and the active memory system's prioritization of high-impact novel experiences.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
